summary: A 15-second Department of Labor apprenticeship promo: slow-motion, color-graded B-roll of workers in white coats assembling electronics on a factory line, with a static 'MAKING AMERICA SKILLED AGAIN' slogan and DOL seal plus an APPRENTICESHIP.GOV bug. The footage has no audio at all (no music, no narration).
notable_text: On-screen: 'MAKING AMERICA SKILLED AGAIN'; 'APPRENTICESHIP.GOV'; Department of Labor seal. Tweet: 'Under @POTUS, we're equipping our workforce with the in-demand skills needed to build a Golden Age of Prosperity for generations to come.'
